about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: Just a Frontend Engineer living in Lisbon, inspired by the intersection of design and technology. Lisbon taught me to see beauty in details, from the colourful tiles to the glow of the afternoon light over the rooftops. That sense of design and harmony naturally found its way into my work.
about.paragraph2: I love transforming complex problems into elegant, performant web experiences that feel effortless to users. With deep expertise in modern JavaScript frameworks and an eye for design, I'm driven by the challenge of creating interfaces that are both visually engaging and technically refined.
about.paragraph3: For me, the web is a canvas, and code is just another way to paint.

person.title: The Person
person.introParagraph:
I believe the best developers are well-rounded humans who bring diverse perspectives 
to problem-solving. When I'm not crafting interfaces, I'm exploring the world,
learning new skills, and staying curious about everything.

intro.heading: My commitment
intro.body: This portfolio is designed to be accessible to people with a wide range of abilities and technologies. I follow web accessibility best practices to ensure clear navigation, readable content, and keyboard-first interaction.

standards.heading: Standards and compliance
standards.body: The site is built with accessible HTML structure, semantic headings, and thoughtful ARIA usage where appropriate. It aims to meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines for colour contrast, navigation, and content structure.

features.heading: Accessibility features
features.keyboardNavigation: Keyboard-friendly navigation and focus states across the site.
features.screenReaderSupport: Semantic markup and descriptive labels to help screen readers understand the page.
features.contrastAndTypography: High contrast text, readable font sizing, and spacing for better readability.
features.responsiveDesign: Responsive layout that works across desktop, tablet, and mobile screens.

limitations.heading: Known limitations
limitations.body: This site may still have limitations in certain areas. Below are a few examples of issues that may exist as the site continues to evolve:

examples.keyboard: Keyboard focus may not always behave consistently inside custom interactive components.
examples.screenReader: Some content or labels may not be as clear as they could be for screen reader users.
examples.colors: Some colour combinations may be borderline for low vision users, especially on accent text or buttons.
examples.spacing: There may be areas where spacing could be improved for better readability and focus visibility.
examples.animations: Motion and animation effects may not include reduced-motion alternatives for users who prefer less animation.

feedback.heading: Feedback and contact
feedback.body: If you encounter any issues while using this site, feel free to reach out.

whatAreCookies.heading: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, and to provide information to the owners of the site.

howWeUse.heading: How we use cookies
howWeUse.body: This portfolio uses only essential and functional cookies — no tracking or advertising cookies are used. The table below describes each cookie set by this site.

consent.purpose: Stores your cookie consent preference (accepted or declined).

theme.purpose: Remembers your preferred colour theme and accent colour.

ga.purpose: Google Analytics — measures anonymous page views, session duration, and referral sources to help improve the site. Only loaded when cookies are accepted.

thirdParty.heading: Third-party cookies
thirdParty.body: This site does not use any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services. No data is shared with external parties through cookies.

yourChoices.heading: Your choices
yourChoices.body: You can decline cookies via the consent banner. You can also clear cookies and localStorage data at any time through your browser settings. Note that declining cookies may affect theme preferences being saved between visits.

contact.heading: Questions?
contact.body: If you have any questions about this cookie policy, feel free to reach out.

notFound.title: You found Schrödinger's page, both exists and doesn't exist.
notFound.description: Let's get you back on track.

cookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies to remember your theme preferences and measure anonymous usage via Google Analytics.
cookieConsent.policyLink: Learn more in our Cookie Policy.
